name: POL_FLAG_1
description: Flag indicating antenna HH (0) or VV (1) polarisation

name: POL_FLAG_2
description: Flag indicating antenna HHV (0) or VVH (1) polarisation

name: SUN_FOV
description: Direct Sun correction for the Sun in the front of the FOV has been performed during image reconstruction of this pixel

name: SUN_GLINT_FOV
description: Reflected Sun correction has been performed during image reconstruction of this pixel. Sun correction is based on the Sea bistatic coefficients defined in the AUX_BSCAT ADF and computed for a fixed wind speed of 7 m/s and wind direction of 0 deg North

name: MOON_FOV
description: Moon correction has been performed during image reconstruction of this pixel

name: SINGLE_SNAPSHOT
description: Scene has been combined with opposite polarization during reconstruction of this pixel

name: RFI_MITIGATION
description: RFI mitigation has been performed during reconstruction of this pixel

name: SUN_POINT
description: Pixel is located in a zone (circle around Sun alias position with radius configurable through Sun_Point_Flag_Size field in AUX CNFL1P) where a Sun alias was reconstructed (if Sun removal is active, measurement may be degraded)

name: SUN_GLINT_AREA
description: Pixel is located in a zone where Sun reflection has been detected using the bi-static scattering coefficient threshold defined in the configuration file

name: MOON_POINT
description: Pixel is located in a zone where a Moon alias was reconstructed (after Moon removal, measurement may be degraded)

name: AF_FOV
description: Measurement is in the alias free field of view

name: RFI_TAILS
description: Measurement has been affected by tails from a point source RFI identified in the AUX_RFI list

name: BORDER_FOV
description: Measurement is near the border delimiting the Extended Alias Free zone or near to the unit circle replicas borders (aka belt & suspenders)

name: SUN_TAILS
description: Pixel is located in the hexagonal alias directions centred on a Sun alias

name: RFI_STRONG
description: Measurement is affected by strong self-estimated RFI in L1b

name: RFI_POINT
description: Measurement has been affected by point source RFI identified in the AUX_RFI list, or it has exceeded an RFI threshold
